data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁 #37
data.summary: [1/21 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[1/21 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Grand Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 8
📷  Period: Permanent
📷https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2718943

#BlueArchive
